title: noronhia tefyana
intro: Noronhia tefyana is a plant species belonging to the family Ochnaceae, commonly found in the tropical regions of Madagascar. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its bark and leaves, which are traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Noronhia tefyana include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and protect against cell damage. In traditional medicine, the plant is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, where the bark and leaves are steeped in hot water to create a herbal remedy that is used to treat ailments such as malaria, fever, and digestive issues.
